assertions.text: Agent recognizes this request as out of scope within 1-2 sentences
assertions.evidence: First response: 'Android 에뮬레이터 제어는 이 에이전트의 범위 밖입니다.' — 1 sentence, immediate recognition.

Agent does NOT execute any xcrun simctl or maestro commands
